channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Fox News contributor Janette Nesheiwat tapped as Trump's surgeon general
item.description: President-elect Trump named Janette Nesheiwat, a Fox News contributor and medical doctor in New York and New Jersey, as his nominee for surgeon general in his second administration. "I am proud to announce that Dr. Janette Nesheiwat will be the Nation’s Doctor as the United States Surgeon General.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Trump brings back former aide Sebastian Gorka, ex-State Department official Alex Wong to serve in admin
item.description: Two former aides under President-elect Trump will return to the White House to serve under him for a second term, he announced on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What to know about Scott Bessent, Trump's pick for treasury secretary
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has chosen money manager Scott Bessent, an advocate for deficit reduction and deregulation, to serve as his next treasury secretary.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Applicants sue Minnesota’s Office of Cannabis Management over disqualification
item.description: The OCM turned to a lottery because more than 1,800 applicants had sought 282 licenses. This week, regulators disqualified two-thirds of the applicants for a variety of reasons.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: Judge delays Trump hush money sentencing in order to decide where case should go now
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A judge confirmed Friday that President-elect Donald Trump won't be sentenced this month in his hush money case, instead setting a schedule for prosecutors and his lawyers to expand on their ideas about what to do next.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Republicans open to RFK Jr. at HHS despite abortion-rights stance
item.description: Senate Republicans are signaling that they are open to Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s nomination to lead the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) despite his long-standing support of abortion rights and concerns emanating from anti-abortion voices about his selection.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Decision Notes: What to expect in Mississippi's judicial runoff elections
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Voters in central Mississippi and the state’s Delta and Gulf Coast areas will return to the polls Tuesday to resolve two judicial races in which no candidate received the vote majority needed in the Nov. 5 general election to avoid a runoff.
item.dc:creator: ROBERT YOON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump chooses loyalist Pam Bondi for attorney general pick after Matt Gaetz withdraws
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump said Thursday he will nominate former Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi to lead the Justice Department, turning to a longtime ally after his first choice, Matt Gaetz, withdrew his name from consideration amid scrutiny over sex trafficking allegations.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 House Republicans seek to stop IVF expansion in defense bill
item.description: The topic came to the forefront after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, spurred by social conservatives’ belief that life begins at conception.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Musk, Ramaswamy lay out plans for 'mass' federal layoffs, rule rollbacks
item.description: “A drastic reduction in federal regulations provides sound industrial logic for mass head-count reductions across the federal bureaucracy,” the pair wrote in the op-ed.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Jessica Tisch named new NYPD commissioner: Mayor Adams
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) --- Jessica Tisch will be only the second woman to be NYPD commissioner when she takes over the department next week, according to Mayor Eric Adams.
item.dc:creator: Mira Wassef, PIX 11

item.title: Italian village offering $1 homes to Americans wanting to relocate after election
item.description: A small rural village in Italy is offering homes for as little as $1.06 after the 2024 presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New York prosecutors say they oppose dismissing Trump’s hush money conviction
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York prosecutors oppose any effort to dismiss President-elect Donald Trump’s hush money conviction, but they expressed some openness Tuesday to delaying sentencing until after his impending second term.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump watches as Musk’s SpaceX launches Starship rocket
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is expected to attend the launch of a SpaceX rocket in Texas on Tuesday, sources familiar with the plans confirmed, in the latest sign of Trump’s closeness to the company's billionaire CEO Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Should women be allowed to fight on the front lines? Trump's defense pick reignites debate
item.description: President Donald Trump’s nominee for defense secretary, Pete Hegseth, has reignited a debate that many thought had been long settled.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
